title: aglaia ceramica
intro: Aglaia ceramica, also known as the Philippine aglaia or Ceramica tree, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aglaia ceramica include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Aglaia ceramica can be prepared as an herbal remedy through decoction or infusion, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine in the Philippines and other parts of Asia.
